sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 0.4g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a fruit, being sweet is normal, but controlling it is what matters.
sections.subtitleText: 0.4g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a fruit, being sweet is normal, but controlling it is what matters.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 75g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for fruit, the real question is whether the sweetness stays under control.
sections.subtitleText: 75g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for fruit, the real question is whether the sweetness stays under control.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 2.5g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. for a fruit, you want sweetness to be kept in check.
sections.subtitleText: 2.5g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. for a fruit, you want sweetness to be kept in check.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 15% daily value, magnesium at 11% daily value stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 15% daily value, magnesium at 11% daily value stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: still brings some useful minerals because not nutritionally empty despite the weak fruit fit. can be useful in high-energy contexts because there are niche cases where the dense sugar load is useful. still a recognisable whole fruit because that matters for fairness even when the category fit is weak.

sections.subtitleText: the upsides first: still brings some useful minerals because not nutritionally empty despite the weak fruit fit. can be useful in high-energy contexts because there are niche cases where the dense sugar load is useful. still a recognisable whole fruit because that matters for fairness even when the category fit is weak.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: sugar density is a major category problem because fruit is supposed to moderate sugar with fibre and payoff, and dates push the sugar side extremely hard. glycemic behaviour is rough for fruit because much weaker fit than fruits with gentler carb behaviour. dried-fruit concentration makes the sugar hit even harsher because this is the cleanest reason dates should remain below ordinary whole fruits like grapes.

displayItems.title: sugar density is a major category problem

sections.subtitleText: on the weaker side: sugar density is a major category problem because fruit is supposed to moderate sugar with fibre and payoff, and dates push the sugar side extremely hard. glycemic behaviour is rough for fruit because much weaker fit than fruits with gentler carb behaviour. dried-fruit concentration makes the sugar hit even harsher because this is the cleanest reason dates should remain below ordinary whole fruits like grapes.

closing.summary: Dates does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best only when the convenience or taste matters more than the nutrition return.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only when the convenience or taste matters more than the nutrition return.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in C tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in C tier with an overall score of 18 from a base nutrition score of 27. Context dragged it down by 9 points.
